subcodes.first_line: O thou homeless one of God! What thou didst write to His Holiness the Afnán of the Sacred Tree hath been noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بیسر و سامان الهی آنچه بحضرت افنان سدره مبارکه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
